Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: dresses by form [300221275], dresses (garments) [300046159], main garments [300209263], clothing [300266639], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Dresses which hang straight from the shoulders, sometimes tapering slightly at hips.
Vestido con caída desde los hombros, a veces adelgazándose ligeramente hasta las caderas.
Jurken die recht naar beneden hangen vanaf de schouders en soms iets toelopen bij de heupen.
Kleid, das gerade von den Schultern herabhängt und das manchmal an den Hüften leicht verjüngt.
肩部以下直直垂下的女裝，有些在臀部會稍微收窄。
